remarks: Updated & Spacious First-Floor Apartment in the Heart of New Canaan  Enjoy the convenience of village living in this bright and spacious first-floor one-bedroom apartment, just steps from New Canaan's renowned Restaurant Row, charming village center, boutique shopping, and Metro-North train station.  This inviting home has been freshly updated throughout, featuring fresh paint, all-new window blinds, two new window air conditioning units, a new kitchen floor, new wall-to-wall carpeting, and an oversized walk-in shower.  Relax on the sunny rear porch overlooking the beautifully maintained lawn, offering a peaceful outdoor retreat.  One small dog will be considered; no cats, please. Applicants with strong credit are preferred.
